title: octomeris polyandra
side_effects: Octomeris polyandra can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness due to its high concentration of glycosides. Prolonged use may lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and an increased risk of bleeding due to its anticoagulant properties. Ingesting large quantities can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and difficulty breathing, in sensitive individuals. Additionally, using Octomeris polyandra as a medicine without proper medical supervision can lead to misdiagnosis or exacerbation of underlying health conditions.
